# Paula’s Choice Customer Story

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Pioneer skincare brand Paula’s Choice turned to Sift to stop more fraud and chargebacks, achieving value in just 3 days post-implementation.

### See the Customer Story

Watch Now

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
